Crystal.Avalonia
Table of Contents

Crystal.Avalonia Documentation

A lightweight, AOT-friendly MVVM framework for Avalonia UI applications.

Getting Started

New to Crystal.Avalonia? Start here:

  • Introduction - Overview of Crystal.Avalonia and its core concepts
  • Getting Started - Step-by-step tutorial to create your first app
  • MVVM Pattern - Learn the MVVM pattern with Crystal.Avalonia

Tutorials

Step-by-step guides for common tasks:

  • Create Your First App - Build a complete counter application
  • Module Development - Create reusable, shareable modules
  • Dependency Injection - Master DI patterns in Crystal.Avalonia

API Reference

  • API Documentation - Generated API reference for Crystal.Avalonia

Quick Links

Resource Description
NuGet Package Download Crystal.Avalonia
Avalonia UI The cross-platform UI framework
.NET Documentation Official .NET documentation

Supported Platforms

Crystal.Avalonia supports all Avalonia platforms:

  • Windows
  • macOS
  • Linux
  • Android
  • iOS
  • WebAssembly (Browser)
